articles.author: Lim Hui Jie
articles.title: Australia hikes rates again and warns inflation will stay higher for longer - CNBC
articles.description: Inflation had picked up materially in the second half of 2025, and the conflict in the Middle East had resulted in sharply higher fuel and commodity prices.
articles.content:
Australia's central bank on Tuesday raised its policy rate to 4.35%, matching its December 2024 peak, as inflation remains elevated.
The move by the Reserve Bank of Australia was in line with expect… [+2692 chars]
